hypothesis: If CBM-learned, orthogonal property steering vectors are added to the hidden activations of a frozen molecular LLM during generation, then the model will more accurately match specified single- and multi-property targets (including out-of-distribution) while preserving validity, novelty, and synthesizability compared to vanilla, ActAdd, and fine-tuning baselines because these vectors align with disentangled property directions in the model’s latent space.
